transcript:
CALLER: Hi, main apna outstanding balance check karna chahta hoon. Maine jo surgery ki last month, uska poora bill clear nahi hua tha.
AGENT: Ji zaroor. Aapka naam aur patient ID bata sakte hain?
CALLER: Umesh Pawar. ID hai... SNC-P-88210.
AGENT: Ek second... haan, dekha. Umesh Pawar ji, aapka outstanding balance hai 12,400 rupaye. Yeh laparoscopic procedure ke baad ka balance hai.
CALLER: Haan, wahi. Toh kya main installment mein de sakta hoon?
AGENT: Hum iske liye billing department se baat kar sakte hain. Usually 2-3 installments allow hoti hain approval ke baad. Main aapka request note kar leta hoon aur billing team aapse kal tak contact karegi.
CALLER: Theek hai. Mera number update hai na files mein?
AGENT: Haan, 9822345601 registered hai. Kal call aayegi. Koi aur kaam?
CALLER: Nahi, shukriya.
